disclaimers: Synthetic users may not capture edge cases real users encounter
Synthetic user behavior may be more direct and less exploratory than real users
The AI may overemphasize certain issues due to the way the prompts were structured
Emotional responses from synthetic users are simulated and may not perfectly reflect real user sentiment
Synthetic task completion times may differ from real-world performance due to idealized conditions.
validation_recommendations: Validate top 3 findings with 5 real users
Conduct A/B testing on proposed fixes for the broken account creation/login flow.
Perform a follow-up survey with at least 20 real users after implementing changes to assess user satisfaction and perceived security.
Analyze website analytics to track user behavior and identify potential usability bottlenecks.
Compare synthetic and real-user data to refine synthetic personas and improve the accuracy of future simulations.
Perform think aloud testing with real users
Check security implementation with a security professional
